title: Puzzle Forest - Medium Challenge
description: A medium jigsaw puzzle adventure with 6x6 grids. For growing puzzle masters!
author: Freya Stories

pages.text: The shed picture got all scrambled! This one has more pieces.
The snowman scene needs rebuilding! 36 pieces to arrange.
The friends are playing in the snow! Put the picture back together.
You mastered the medium puzzles! You're getting really good at this!

localizedTitle.ja: パズルの森 - 中級チャレンジ
localizedTitle.zh: 拼图森林 - 中级挑战

localizedDescription.en: A medium jigsaw puzzle adventure with 6x6 grids. For growing puzzle masters!
localizedDescription.pl: Średnia przygoda z puzzlami 6x6. Dla rosnących mistrzów puzzli!
localizedDescription.es: Una aventura de rompecabezas media con cuadrículas de 6x6. ¡Para maestros de rompecabezas en crecimiento!
localizedDescription.de: Ein mittleres Puzzle-Abenteuer mit 6x6-Gittern. Für wachsende Puzzlemeister!
localizedDescription.fr: Une aventure puzzle moyenne avec des grilles 6x6. Pour les maîtres du puzzle en herbe !
localizedDescription.it: Un'avventura puzzle media con griglie 6x6. Per maestri del puzzle in crescita!
localizedDescription.pt: Uma aventura de quebra-cabeça média com grades 6x6. Para mestres de quebra-cabeça em crescimento!
localizedDescription.ja: 6x6グリッドの中級ジグソーパズル冒険。成長するパズルマスターに！
localizedDescription.ar: مغامرة لغز متوسطة بشبكات 6×6. لأساتذة الألغاز الناشئين!
localizedDescription.tr: 6x6 ızgaralı orta seviye yapboz macerası. Büyüyen yapboz ustaları için!
localizedDescription.nl: Een gemiddeld puzzelavontuur met 6x6-rasters. Voor groeiende puzzelmeesters!
localizedDescription.da: Et medium puslespilseventyr med 6x6 gitre. For voksende puslespilsmestre!
localizedDescription.la: Aenigma medium cum reticulis 6×6. Pro magistris aenigmatum crescentibus!
localizedDescription.zh: 一个6x6中级拼图冒险。适合成长中的拼图大师！
